text: 8. The Subcontractor is to provide complete and operating systems, the contract is based on all plans and specifications, not just the trade specific documents. Any items contained in any other drawing or specification which requires trade related work or coordination whether specifically indicated in the trade drawings or specifications, must be provided under this subcontract at no additional cost to Contractor or the Owner. In case of discrepancies between plans and specifications the Owner is entitled to either item at his discretion, as appropriate to fulfill the intent of documents and provide a complete and operating system at no additional cost.
